# I need to move toward the stairs - I'm at (13,3) and stairs appear to be to the right
print()
print(f"My position: ({nh.status['x']}, {nh.status['y']})")
print(f"Under me: {nh.under_player}")
print(f"Adjacent: {nh.adjacent}")
# Move toward the stairs (east direction)
nh.move('E')

# Check recent history and plan next move
lines = history.splitlines()
recent = '\n'.join(lines[-30:])
print(f"Recent actions:\n{recent}")
print(f"\nCurrent position: {nh.status['x']}, {nh.status['y']}")
print(f"Under player: {nh.under_player}")
print(f"Adjacent: {nh.adjacent}")
